== Evil Pattern ==
Statistics show that tattoos increase the boldness of those with tattoos and their unusual death rate.

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Evil Pattern
|Rarity=green
|ID Number=7
|Initial HP=10
|HP Increase=0
|Initial ATK=1
|ATK Increase=0
|Initial DEF=1
|DEF Increase=0
|Initial RUSH=0
|RUSH Increase=0
|Effect 1=When exploring, Cells collected +5%
|Initial Effect Value 1=
|Effect Value Increase 1=
|Effect 2=
|Initial Effect Value 2=
|Effect Value Increase 2=
|Effect 3=
|Initial Effect Value 3=
|Effect Value Increase 3=
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

== Source ==
Starting Evolution

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Green Organs]]
__NOTOC__
